'''Mowgle''' was a low-tech [[Agriworld/Legends|agriworld]]<ref name="I">{{WEGCite|story=Infiltration (adventure)|book=Supernova (sourcebook)}}</ref> in the [[Core Worlds/Legends|Core Worlds]],<ref name="TEA-OC" /> one [[Standard day/Legends|day]] and three [[Standard hour/Legends|hours]] from [[Demophon]] with a Class 1 [[Hyperdrive/Legends|hyperdrive]]. It was responsible for much of the consumables produced for Demophon during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. [[Thadius Black]] arranged for political prisoners from Demophon to be smuggled here as cargo soon before the [[Demophon system/Legends|Demophon system]] was destroyed in a [[Supernova/Legends|supernova]].<ref name="I" />

==Appearances==
*{{WEGCite|story=Infiltration (adventure)|book=Supernova (sourcebook)}}
